visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair and dramatic makeup holds a light blue package of 'Dr. Wonder Piercing Ear Seeds'. She is in a brightly lit indoor room. (2) Close-ups of instructional diagrams showing acupressure points on a human ear. Her fingers point to icons indicating various health benefits. (3) Detailed shots of the ear seeds, which are small silver and gold metallic spheres on transparent adhesive tape, resting on a wooden surface. (4) The woman uses a white alcohol prep pad to clean her right ear while looking into the camera. (5) She meticulously applies the seeds to her ear lobe and outer ear edge, pressing them with her fingertip. (6) A montage shows her in different settings: sitting in a car seat with a seatbelt visible, and in a restaurant eating a large round food item with a spoon. (7) Nighttime shots show her ears with the seeds, followed by a sequence of her waking up the next morning wearing glasses, and then on the third day, expressing her skepticism to the camera.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 在韓國買到. [Subtitle]: 可以消水腫的. [Subtitle]: 穴位耳針👂. (2) [Subtitle]: 每個穴位對應到身體哪個部位. [Subtitle]: 能幫助哪裡的血液循環. (3) [Subtitle]: 臉部水腫. [Subtitle]: 減肥. [Subtitle]: 頭痛. [Subtitle]: 月經痛. [Subtitle]: 壓力. [Subtitle]: 睡眠問題. (4) [Subtitle]: 有這種設計!. [Subtitle]: 幸好不是像耳環那種真的「針」. [Subtitle]: 偏按摩感的那種. (5) [Subtitle]: 1. 先用酒精棉片把耳朵擦一擦. [Variety]: ?. [Variety]: 冬瓜路過中. (6) [Subtitle]: 2. 把耳針貼上去. [Subtitle]: 輕輕按個10下. [Variety]: 喔?. [Variety]: 🌸. (7) [Subtitle]: 也有不同設計!. [Subtitle]: 但老實說. [Subtitle]: 黑色的看起來有點像 痣. [Variety]: ???. (8) [Subtitle]: 會先觀察一整天. [Subtitle]: 聽說中間可以一天按個. [Subtitle]: 2~3次會更好喔. (9) [Variety]: 好睏🥱. [Subtitle]: 我看起來有比較消水腫嗎?. [Subtitle]: 🌚冬瓜：你本來就沒腫啦. (10) [Subtitle]: 你過關!. [Subtitle]: 老實說不知道到底有沒有差. [Subtitle]: 到晚上耳朵尾端超痛😭. [Subtitle]: 決定把耳輪那邊先撕掉. [Subtitle]: 差點以為被穿洞了😂. (11) [Subtitle]: 隔天早上. [Variety]: ʕ/ω\ʔ. [Subtitle]: 你們幫我看看... [Subtitle]: 第三天!. [Subtitle]: 我覺得有點像把錢丟水裡. [Subtitle]: 大家給我一個客觀判斷吧.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character appears throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long black hair, wearing a white V-neck top and vibrant eye makeup.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Starts in a clean indoor room with neutral walls; moves to a car interior with leather seats and a restaurant with tables and other patrons.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, bright background music starts with an upbeat electronic drum pattern. A female voice speaks excitedly in Mandarin, introducing a product. (2) A subtle digital 'whoosh' sound effect marks a transition. The speaker's pitch rises as she explains the ear diagram's features. (3) The music maintains a steady tempo while the speaker lists benefits like headache relief and weight loss, using short, punchy phrases. (4) Faint sounds of a car's interior hum are heard behind the narration as the scene changes. The voice remains energetic. (5) Sound of slurping or eating is heard during a restaurant scene, momentarily lowering the speech-to-noise ratio. (6) The final audio section features a slightly lower pitch as the speaker expresses her concluding thoughts, while the music stays consistent until the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Introduction -> Demonstration -> Experience -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a personal review and demonstration of 'Dr. Wonder' ear acupressure seeds, evaluating their claimed benefits for de-puffing and overall health through a multi-day trial.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video prominently features the brand 'Dr. Wonder' and demonstrates its usage in detail.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video combines fast-paced social media editing with a vlog-style 'test' narrative, typical for beauty influencers.
